title: Amtech S0476 Retractable Utility Knife with Soft Grip
availability_text: Only 2 left in stock (more on the way).
features: DURABLE AND COMFORTABLE TO USE: This utility knife has a strong, zinc alloy die cast body with a soft, non-slip rubber grip for greater comfort and ease of use
VERSATILE AND EASY TO USE: With a quick blade change mechanism, this safety knife has an integral blade storage magazine and comes with 4 spare blades
EXTRA FEATURE: It also has a handy, integrated string cutter
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description The Amtech S0476 Retractable Utility Knife is supplied with 4 superior retractable blades, that can used on a wide variety of DIY household tasks. It features a strong aluminium design, quick blade change mechanism and comfortable sift grip for heavy duty handling. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning Yes Box Contains 1x Knife See more
